name: software-engineer-stack
description: End-to-end software engineering lifecycle framework: intake, research, technical design, grill (adversarial design interrogation), implementation planning, coding with verification, delivery, change requests, and documentation — for PL/SQL, SQL, KSH, and Python codebases. Accurate (source-referenced docs, runnable verification), fault-tolerant (resumable stage gates), self-improving (retro lessons, domain glossary), and scope-disciplined (scope contracts).
